TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_owas_na_bnkisan_Tayal, title = owas_na_bnkisan_Tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/owas_na_bnkisan_Tayal} }

S.FORM: owas na bnkisan Tayal lalu' san ta owas na bnkisan Tayal bih llyung Klesan ga "owas na Tayal". kahun innglung ta tbcyan tna'an mita owas na bnkisan Tayal kwe ga, maki tugan cnyan ta lalu nya: utux ga owas na pnluhing bnkis lela, sa'ing ga baley na owas Tayal son ta, tugan ga owas p'wasan na Mrhow Tayal son ta kmayan, ini ga owas na bnkis Tayal uy, ini ga owas na bnkisan Tayal. cka na owas pn'wasan kya ga, nya pnluhing snrhuw na bnkisan ta lela, "owas na lmuhuw", kwe ga baley "owas na snbilan bnkisan", iyik yow na owas snbilan bnkisan ta kwe ga, maki ci yow nya, yani ci nya sbiru suruw: te qutux ga owas na lmuhuw, owas na lmuhuw kwe ga magan ini ptna' gaga p'wasan, tbcyan ga kyan (1) owas na klahang gaga na sna'san na ryax (2) owas na mbahing, nanak knerin naha mowas, ini powas mlikuy ro nanak mwah twang shelow ke hiya (3) owas p'wasan sna'san ryax na hntgan la'iy, mnagan lpyung, ms'un mrkyas, m'out mlahuy. (4) owas na skramat (5) owas na smiyey. te saying gaowas na knbahan, ini ga son ta kmayal maha owas na knhmgan te tugal ga owas na ppiyiy ta te payat ga owas na lmuhuw nya pkita snrhow ke ro yow na puying khulan ta. te magal ga owas na la'iy, owas na la'iy ga nya tbcyan owas na la'iy hbku, owas trang maki inlungan na la'iy, maki owas na la'iy tipik, maki owas na la'iy ci, maki owas na p'wasan la'iy hopa, maki owas la'iy p'wasan na yaya ro la'iy.

owas na bnkisan Tayal lalu' san ta owas na bnkisan Tayal bih llyung Klesan ga "owas na Tayal". kahun innglung ta tbcyan tna'an mita owas na bnkisan Tayal kwe ga, maki tugan cnyan ta lalu nya: utux ga owas na pnluhing bnkis lela, sa'ing ga baley na owas Tayal son ta, tugan ga owas p'wasan na Mrhow Tayal son ta kmayan, ini ga owas na bnkis Tayal uy, ini ga owas na bnkisan Tayal. cka na owas pn'wasan kya ga, nya pnluhing snrhuw na bnkisan ta lela, "owas na lmuhuw", kwe ga baley "owas na snbilan bnkisan", iyik yow na owas snbilan bnkisan ta kwe ga, maki ci yow nya, yani ci nya sbiru suruw: te qutux ga owas na lmuhuw, owas na lmuhuw kwe ga magan ini ptna' gaga p'wasan, tbcyan ga kyan (1) owas na klahang gaga na sna'san na ryax (2) owas na mbahing, nanak knerin naha mowas, ini powas mlikuy ro nanak mwah twang shelow ke hiya (3) owas p'wasan sna'san ryax na hntgan la'iy, mnagan lpyung, ms'un mrkyas, m'out mlahuy. (4) owas na skramat (5) owas na smiyey. te saying gaowas na knbahan, ini ga son ta kmayal maha owas na knhmgan te tugal ga owas na ppiyiy ta te payat ga owas na lmuhuw nya pkita snrhow ke ro yow na puying khulan ta. te magal ga owas na la'iy, owas na la'iy ga nya tbcyan owas na la'iy hbku, owas trang maki inlungan na la'iy, maki owas na la'iy tipik, maki owas na la'iy ci, maki owas na p'wasan la'iy hopa, maki owas la'iy p'wasan na yaya ro la'iy.
S.PHON: owas~Й• na ОІnkis~Й•an tajal laluК” s~Й•an ta owas~Й• na ОІnkis~Й•an tajal ОІiД§ lljuЕӢ kles~Й•an ЙЈa "owas~Й• na tajal". kaД§un inЕӢluЕӢ ta tОІКҰ~КЁjan tnaК”an mita owas~Й• na ОІnkis~Й•an tajal kwe ЙЈa, maki tuЙЈan КҰ~КЁnjan ta lalu nja: utux ЙЈa owas~Й• na pnluД§iЕӢ ОІnkis~Й• lela, s~Й•aК”iЕӢ ЙЈa ОІalej na owas~Й• tajal s~Й•on ta, tuЙЈan ЙЈa owas~Й• pК”was~Й•an na mrД§ow tajal s~Й•on ta kmajan, ini ЙЈa owas~Й• na ОІnkis~Й• tajal uj, ini ЙЈa owas~Й• na ОІnkis~Й•an tajal. КҰ~КЁka na owas~Й• pnК”was~Й•an kja ЙЈa, nja pnluД§iЕӢ s~Й•nrД§uw na ОІnkis~Й•an ta lela, "owas~Й• na lmuД§uw", kwe ЙЈa ОІalej "owas~Й• na s~Й•nОІilan ОІnkis~Й•an", ijik jow na owas~Й• s~Й•nОІilan ОІnkis~Й•an ta kwe ЙЈa, maki КҰ~КЁi jow nja, jani КҰ~КЁi nja s~Й•ОІiru s~Й•uruw: te qutux ЙЈa owas~Й• na lmuД§uw, owas~Й• na lmuД§uw kwe ЙЈa maЙЈan ini ptnaК” ЙЈaЙЈa pК”was~Й•an, tОІКҰ~КЁjan ЙЈa kjan (*) owas~Й• na klaД§aЕӢ ЙЈaЙЈa na s~Й•naК”s~Й•an na rjax (*) owas~Й• na mОІaД§iЕӢ, nanak knerin naД§a mowas~Й•, ini powas~Й• mlikuj ro nanak mwaД§ twaЕӢ s~Й•Д§elow ke Д§ija (*) owas~Й• pК”was~Й•an s~Й•naК”s~Й•an rjax na Д§ntЙЈan laК”ij, mnaЙЈan lpjuЕӢ, ms~Й•К”un mrkjas~Й•, mК”out mlaД§uj. (*) owas~Й• na s~Й•kramat (*) owas~Й• na s~Й•mijej. te s~Й•ajiЕӢ ЙЈaowas~Й• na knОІaД§an, ini ЙЈa s~Й•on ta kmajal maД§a owas~Й• na knД§mЙЈan te tuЙЈal ЙЈa owas~Й• na ppijij ta te pajat ЙЈa owas~Й• na lmuД§uw nja pkita s~Й•nrД§ow ke ro jow na pujiЕӢ kД§ulan ta. te maЙЈal ЙЈa owas~Й• na laК”ij, owas~Й• na laК”ij ЙЈa nja tОІКҰ~КЁjan owas~Й• na laК”ij Д§ОІku, owas~Й• traЕӢ maki inluЕӢan na laК”ij, maki owas~Й• na laК”ij tipik, maki owas~Й• na laК”ij КҰ~КЁi, maki owas~Й• na pК”was~Й•an laК”ij Д§opa, maki owas~Й• laК”ij pК”was~Й•an na jaja ro laК”ij.
